headline: Is Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BLDR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Builders FirstSource, Inc. on X.com by @tomicki. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BLDR. Builders FirstSource, Inc.’s share was trading at $75.62 as of June 1st. BLDR’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.86 and 15.95 respectively according to Yahoo […]
